landing.hero.heading: One platform for every tool your team subscribes to.
landing.hero.subheading: Allocore Suite unites central auth, team management, module gating, billing, and analytics into a single, consistent shell.
landing.features.heading: Built for multi-tool SaaS teams
landing.features.subheading: Everything you need to onboard customers, manage access, and ship connected products from one admin panel.
landing.features.auth.title: Central auth
landing.features.auth.desc: Single sign-on across all modules with role-based access.
landing.features.teams.title: Team workspaces
landing.features.teams.desc: Create teams, invite members, and switch context instantly.
landing.features.billing.title: Billing & plans
landing.features.billing.desc: Stripe, PayPal, and bank-transfer subscriptions with plan gating.
landing.features.analytics.title: Analytics dashboard
landing.features.analytics.desc: Combined insights from every subscribed module in one place.
landing.modules.heading: Connected modules
landing.modules.subheading: Unlock the tools your team needs. Each module shares the same auth, team, and billing layer.
landing.modules.empty: New modules are added as your product suite grows.
landing.how.heading: How it works
landing.how.subheading: Get your team up and running in three simple steps.
landing.how.step1.title: Create your workspace
landing.how.step1.desc: Sign up, set your team, and configure billing in minutes.
landing.how.step2.title: Subscribe to modules
landing.how.step2.desc: Pick the tools your business needs and manage access per user.
landing.how.step3.title: Work from one dashboard
landing.how.step3.desc: Use unified analytics, activity feeds, and exports across every tool.
landing.testimonials.heading: Loved by fast-moving teams
landing.testimonials.quote: Allocore Suite let us ship multiple products under one auth and billing shell without rebuilding the basics every time.
landing.testimonials.author: Product Team Lead
landing.cta.heading: Start using Allocore Suite today
landing.cta.subheading: Create an account, invite your team, and subscribe to the modules that power your business.
landing.meta.description: Allocore Suite unites central auth, team management, module gating, billing, and analytics into a single, consistent shell.
landing.meta.keywords: SaaS, team management, billing, modules, authentication

Complete these steps to get started.
Start with a 14-day free trial of any pl: Start with a 14-day free trial of any plan.
Your subscribed tools are ready. Open on: Your subscribed tools are ready. Open one to create your first record.
Explore and subscribe to the tools that: Explore and subscribe to the tools that fit your workflow.
Hi! Ask me about your tools, workflows,: Hi! Ask me about your tools, workflows, or what to do next.
Ask me about your modules, get next-step: Ask me about your modules, get next-step recommendations, and navigate the platform.
Start a conversation with the assistant.
Hello! I can help you with your subscrib: Hello! I can help you with your subscribed tools. Ask me anything about them.
To manage invoices, subscribe to Invoice: To manage invoices, subscribe to InvoiceMaker from the Tools page.
You can create invoices in InvoiceMaker: You can create invoices in InvoiceMaker → Invoices. I can also help you check overdue amounts from the billing dashboard.
To track leads, subscribe to LeadOS from: To track leads, subscribe to LeadOS from the Tools page.
LeadOS helps you capture leads, score th: LeadOS helps you capture leads, score them with AI, and run outreach sequences.
For project management, subscribe to Pla: For project management, subscribe to PlanHive from the Tools page.
PlanHive gives you projects, tasks, goal: PlanHive gives you projects, tasks, goals, calendar and reminders.
SmartKpi has advanced KPI relationships,: SmartKpi has advanced KPI relationships, forecasts and problem management. You can also use KpiTool for catalog-style KPIs.
KpiTool has a KPI catalog, monthly sprea: KpiTool has a KPI catalog, monthly spreadsheet, targets and CSV import/export.
For KPIs, subscribe to KpiTool or SmartK: For KPIs, subscribe to KpiTool or SmartKpi from the Tools page.
I can help you navigate your tools. Try: I can help you navigate your tools. Try asking about invoices, leads, projects, KPIs, or any module you want to use.
Upload a CSV or Excel file to import rec: Upload a CSV or Excel file to import records into a module.
